quicksight.analysis.topbottomfilter.CfnA: A `TopBottomFilter` filters values that are at the top or the bottom.

quicksight.analysis.topbottomfilter.Aggr.Description: The aggregation and sort configuration of the top bottom filter.

quicksight.analysis.topbottomfilter.Colu.Description: The column that the filter is applied to.

quicksight.analysis.topbottomfilter.Filt.Description: An identifier that uniquely identifies a filter within a dashboard, analysis, or template.

quicksight.analysis.topbottomfilter.Limi.Description: The number of items to include in the top bottom filter results.

quicksight.analysis.topbottomfilter.Para.Description: The parameter whose value should be used for the filter value.

quicksight.analysis.topbottomfilter.Time.Description: The level of time precision that is used to aggregate `DateTime` values.
quicksight.analysis.topbottomfilter.Time.Allowed values: DAY | HOUR | MILLISECOND | MINUTE | MONTH | QUARTER | SECOND | WEEK | YEAR
